milestone_health.raw_metric: 8/14 milestones delayed or missed: Configuration and Build phase, UAT, Train The Trainer, Go-Live & Support intro, Hyper Care(Measure and Adoption) Solution, Project Initiation & Data Gathering, Configuration Documentation workshop, P2P Cutover

blockers.raw_metric: 1 open blocker(s) flagged At-Risk, oldest 78 day(s): Supplier Notification template

explanation.narrative: Zycus - Titan S2P Implementation is Red this week. In plain terms: 8 of its 14 milestones are delayed or missed, including Configuration and Build phase and UAT; one blocker ("Supplier Notification template") has been open for 78 days; and stakeholder comments read mostly cautious or mixed. Data confidence for this read is medium.
